# Introduction

## A common problem

In data science, we often separate:

- code
- results
- explanatory text

<br/>

. . .

This creates several issues:

- lack of reproducibility
- hard maintenance
- results becoming disconnected from the code


## A common problem

::: {.center}
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/s3JldKoA0zw >}}

[_Credits:_ [Ignasi Bartomeus](https://bartomeuslab.com/)]{.small}
:::
